creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 04/27/10 10:15, Matthias Andree wrote:
> I spoke too soon, and can in fact pinpoint the bug and propose a new patch.
> 
> This only affects ports that have no matching INDEX lines for their
> origin

Thanks for this, I've committed most of your patch plus some more error
handling for this issue in r207336. I'll be updating the ports version
soon.


Doug
